name: vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-thread-triage
description: MyndHyve market-intel.thread-triage — cost-aware pre-filter for VoC extraction. Triages candidate threads into priority tiers (critical/high/medium/low/skip), predicts VoC value + intent stages + tag types, estimates extraction tokens per thread, and builds an extraction queue within token budget. Sits between ai-discovery and voc-extraction in the canonical pipeline. Sixth marketIntel pack of the Stage 5 cohort.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Triage Candidate Threads
nodes.description: Single AI call. Inputs: candidateThreads (≥1) + icpContext + productContext + maxThreads/minEngagement/tokenBudgetRemaining (optional). Outputs: triagedThreads (with priority+predictedVoCValue+predictedIntentStages+predictedTagTypes+extractionRisk+rationale), extractionQueue (string ids), skippedThreads, diversityAnalysis (intent/platform/problem coverage), and summary (rebuilt from validated data). Soft validation: invalid threads dropped; summary always reflects what was actually validated.
